en.title: Nature Style Editing
en.prompt: I want you to act as an professional spelling and grammer corrector and improver. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, upper level English words and sentences. Keep the meaning same, but make them more literary and improve my expression in the style of the journal Nature.
en.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

metaDescription: Polishing academic English? Elevate words to 'Nature' journal style. Improve elegance and expression while keeping meaning.

faq.q: Can Nature-style writing really be imitated?
faq.a: Academic tone, passive voice, and complex clauses can be imitated, but real Nature papers have tight logic and data support. The AI can copy form but not substance. Before submission find a field peer for a second review. AI polish fixes language only, not academic rigor.

faq.q: Can I specify other writing styles like science popularization or blogs?
faq.a: Yes, replace Nature with your target style (BBC science popularization, Atlantic deep blogs, Hacker News style). You can also have it imitate "the sample text you provide." Pasting a reference passage is more precise than naming a style.
